title: codereview-pass3: CCP-16 robustness incomplete without desync FSM
description: The overview mentions desync recovery but does not include or reference the state machine for desync/join/drift as required by the parent epic project-LICHEN-ofrf and chunk task. The multi-root section is good start but robustness requires explicit FSM table with states (UNSYNC, ACQUIRING, SYNCED, DRIFTING), transitions, timers (e.g. beacon-timeout, version-hold), actions. This is P1 for the robustness focus of this bead. Parallel desync research noted in task not incorporated.
